title: rubus moluccanus var. subramiflorus
intro: Rubus moluccanus var. subramiflorus, also known as the Moluccan raspberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, Rubus moluccanus var. subramiflorus is often used as a tea, tincture, or capsule to support overall health and well-being.
